                                                                                    
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
                                                                                    
       MAP CODE:           LAST ISSUED:      REVISED:                PAGE:          
       E-6-C               May 1, 2022       May 1, 2025             2 OF 2         
       ELECTRICAL WORKERS  EPSCA WAGE SCHEDULE FOR ALL ELIGIBLE CONTRACTORS PERFORMING
       Local 105           ELECTRICAL CONSTRUCTION WORK ON OPGI AND BRUCE POWER FACILITIES
       Hamilton                                                                     
            Overtime Rate - Section 806                                             
            Mon. to Fri. - 1 1/2 times for up to and including 2 hours beyond the normal
                      daily scheduled number of hours. This applies for both 4 day x 10 hours per day schedule
                      and 5 day x 8 hours per day schedule.                         
                      Non-Scheduled Work Days - 2 times for all hours worked.       
            Sat.      2 times for all hours worked.                                 
            Sun. & Holidays - 2 times for all hours worked.                         
                      and 5 day x 8 hours per day schedule.                         
            UNION FUNDS                                                             
            Union Funds include the following items:                                
                           Training - $0.40 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2016   
                         Stabilization - $1.50 per hour paid                        
                                 $3.09 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2025        
                                 $3.16 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2026        
                                 $3.23 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2027        
                           DeNovo - $0.02 per hour paid                             
                                 $0.05 per hour worked - effective May 1, 2025      
                          IBEW CCO - $0.10 per hour paid                            
                  Retirement Incentive (Taxable) - $0.81 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2024
                                 $0.84 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2025        
                                 $0.88 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2026        
                                 $0.91 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2027        
                        Local Union Dues Checkoff - $1.13 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2024
                                      $1.16 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2025   
                                      $1.18 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2026   
                                      $1.20 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2027   
                        Building Fund - $0.34 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2020 
                                 $0.40 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2025        
                                 $0.41 per hour paid - effective May 1, 2027        
            UNION DUES                                                              
            Union Dues are included in Union Funds for this Local.                  
            BENEFITS                                                                
            All remittances (employer contributions, employee deductions and EPSCA Association Fund should be forwarded to:
            Union Dues), excluding the EPSCA Association Fund, are to be EPSCA Association Fund
            sent to:                          190 Attwell Drive, Suite 580          
             HEAF                             Etobicoke, ON M9W 6H8                 
             370 York Blvd., Suite 102                                              
             HAMILTON, ON L8R 3L1                                                   
       GEOGRAPHIC AREA: Hamilton-Wentworth(RM); Haldimand-Norfolk(RM) except the Town of Dunnville; Brant County; in Waterloo (RM) that portion
       of the City of Cambridge east of a line drawn from the intersection of the southeast corner of Wellington County and Waterloo (RM) to the northeast
       corner of Brant County; Halton (RM) west of the 8th line and south of Hwy 401.
